tasks.subject: Task 1: Windows Node install (zip + layout normalization)
tasks.description:
zip download/extract with traversal+symlink guards; normalize to node/bin layout; unix unchanged.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/ahandd/src/browser_setup/node.rs", "crates/ahandd/src/plugin_runtime/runtime_dir.rs", "crates/ahandd/Cargo.toml"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p ahandd browser_setup", "acceptanceCriteria": ["zip path safe", "layout satisfies RuntimeDirs", "unix byte-identical"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Windows-aware npm + playwright-cli invocation
tasks.description:
npm_invocation()/playwright_cli_invocation() program+args seams (node.exe npm-cli.js on windows); unify exe_name with ahand_platform; migrate callers.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/ahandd/src/plugin_runtime/runtime_dir.rs", "crates/ahandd/src/browser_setup/playwright.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p ahandd playwright", "acceptanceCriteria": ["no npm.exe assumption", "invocation seams tested both platforms"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: browser.rs runtime spawn fixes
tasks.description:
PATH via path_env::prepend_path_dirs; CLI spawn via invocation seam; kill path windows-safe.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/ahandd/src/browser.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p ahandd browser", "acceptanceCriteria": ["no ':' PATH literal", "platform-aware fallback"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Native browser-init (ahandctl + admin SSE, no bash)
tasks.description:
browser_init.rs + admin SSE call ahandd browser_setup directly; SSE wire format byte-compatible; upgrade drops setup-browser.sh shipping; script deprecated; activation 'shell' dep verified.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/ahandctl/src/browser_init.rs", "crates/ahandctl/src/admin.rs", "crates/ahandctl/src/upgrade/assets.rs", "scripts/dist/setup-browser.sh"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p ahandctl -p ahandd", "acceptanceCriteria": ["zero bash spawns in client crates", "SSE format unchanged"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: CI browser-chain e2e (windows + ubuntu) — M3 gate
tasks.description:
browser-e2e job: real node zip install + npm + playwright-cli + doctor on windows-latest/ubuntu-latest; iterate green.

```json:metadata
{"files": [".github/workflows/client-ci.yml"], "verifyCommand": "gh pr checks green", "acceptanceCriteria": ["doctor green on both OS", "no masking fixes"]}
```
